commit_scope: Move native training receipts from one static proof into continuous witness-cycle windows with a larger heldout gate.

commands: coord join && coord claim "continuous live witness training cycles"
cd form && ./validate.sh form-stdlib/core.fk form-stdlib/nearest-shape.fk form-stdlib/classifier-eval.fk form-stdlib/native-training-receipt.fk form-stdlib/tests/native-training-receipt-band.fk

PYTHONPATH=api python3 - <<'PY'
import asyncio
from app.routers import models
r=asyncio.run(models.get_learning_dashboard())
a=r.native_training_artifacts[0]
print(r.summary.trained_native_model_count, a.artifact_id, a.continuous_cycle_count, a.cycle_receipt_count, a.latest_cycle_seq, a.heldout_count, a.larger_heldout_window_pass)
PY

python3 scripts/witness_oracle_emission_ledger.py --cycles 3 --interval 1 --print-record --no-write >/tmp/live-witness-probe.json; rc=$?; test "$rc" -eq 2; python3 - <<'PY'
import json
r=json.load(open('/tmp/live-witness-probe.json'))
assert r['status'] == 'blocked'
assert 'emission cycles are not increasing' in r['block_reasons']
print(r['status'], r['seqs'])
PY
cd web && npm ci --cache ../.cache/npm --prefer-offline && npm run build
local_validation.notes: The native training receipt now carries 3 witness cycle receipts, latest seq 1525, 12 heldout rows, 12 correct predictions, and larger_heldout_window_pass=true. Focused Form validation returned 2047 with `fourth arm: 1 band(s) four-way (fkwu + pre-flattened tables)` and `1 ok, 0 divergent`; the manifest gate returned `PASS-4WAY native-training-receipt`. The dashboard read returned `1 form-native-nearest-shape-v0 3 3 1525 12 True`. The live witness probe reached localhost:8800 but correctly refused to claim a live cycle because present=false and all sampled cycles stayed at seq 1522; this keeps stale live state out of trained receipts.

ci_validation.notes: Not pushed when this evidence was written; CI has not run yet.

deploy_validation.summary: No deploy requested for this native receipt/dashboard slice.

phase_gate.gate: Native training artifacts must be built from comparable witness emission cycle windows and a larger heldout gate before claiming progress beyond the first receipt.
phase_gate.next: Restore or restart the live witness stream so localhost:8800 reports present=true with increasing seq values, then generate the receipt from a pass-status witness emission record instead of the deterministic proof window.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: The training receipt lane can now ingest pass-status witness oracle emission records, derive prototype weights and heldout rows from cycle labels, and expose the resulting cycle window on the dashboard. The committed floor proves a 3-cycle/12-heldout window and refuses stale live witness state.
test_flows: Default receipt generation produces 3 cycle receipts and 12 heldout rows.
Receipt generation can consume a pass-status witness emission record.
The dashboard exposes cycle_receipt_count, latest_cycle_seq, heldout_count, and larger_heldout_window_pass.
The Form band proves the same larger heldout window four-way.
The live witness probe blocks stale/non-increasing local state instead of adding a false live receipt.
e2e_validation.summary: The established floor is a continuous-cycle receipt generator and dashboard surface with a 3-cycle/12-heldout Form-native proof. The remaining physical gap is a fresh live witness stream with increasing seq values.
